Video.summary: Jillian dives into an off-grid dream when she visits a one-of-a-kind Quonset hut in Joshua Tree.
Video.title: Off-Grid Living: The Creative Space

Video.summary: Designer Julie Couch transforms everything from small rooms to outdoor spaces.
Video.title: The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living

Image.alt: The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living
The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living
The Formula for Small Spaces & Outdoor Living

Video.summary: Leah stops by recording artist Zac Brown's wilderness retreat and TV star Toya Wright's pristine palace.
Video.title: Zac Brown & Toya Wright

Video.summary: Leah house sits for comic and radio host Rickey Smiley and Real Housewives of Atlanta legend Phaedra Parks.
Video.title: Rickey Smiley & Phaedra Parks

Video.summary: Captain Boomies meets Tom Biddix—a yachtsman who helped design the demo yacht they take for a spin.
Video.title: Tom's "Team Monarch"

Video.summary: Captain Boomies tours Wharf Rat, a Bahamian-blue beauty built for fun, travel, and serious sport.
Video.title: Captain Gill's "Wharf Rat"

Video.summary: In Knoxville, Tennessee, Captain Boomies joins the Arnold family for a very special maiden voyage.
Video.title: The Arnold's "A-Sea"

Video.summary: Jillian experiences a kaleidoscope of color exploring the Mosaic Tile House and the Rainbow House.
Video.title: Living in Art: Kaleidoscopic Homes

Video.summary: Nina heads to Nashville, Tennessee to turn a 37-acre farm into a family homestead.
Video.title: Creating a Family Homestead

Video.summary: Andrea's off to Palm Springs for a fun-filled day with actor Jonathan Bennett.
Video.title: Jonathan Bennett’s Mai Tai Manor

Video.summary: Andrea lands in Upstate New York for pancakes, ping pong and plenty of fun with Nigel Barker.
Video.title: Nigel Barker’s Picture Perfect Mountain Home

Image.alt: Nigel Barker’s Picture Perfect Mountain Home
Nigel Barker’s Picture Perfect Mountain Home
Nigel Barker’s Picture Perfect Mountain Home

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: Building & Tending Your Garden

Video.summary: Nina gets back to the basics of gardening with tips and tricks anyone can adopt.
Video.title: A Bountiful Harvest

Video.summary: Kimberly and Justin need an overhaul for their twelve-sided, dodecagon dream house.
Video.title: Kimberly & Justin’s Dodecagon Dream

Video.summary: Eduardo and Gabriela's ‘little’ home projects have piled up and they’re ready for Drew’s help.
Video.title: Eduardo & Gabriela’s Guest Retreat

Video.summary: Margot and Josh spent years perfecting every room in the house but overlooked their bedroom.
Video.title: Margot & Josh’s Teal Transformation

Video.summary: Levi Kelly explores tiny BNB's, from snow covered yurts to reimagined shipping containers.

Video.summary: Julie Couch breaks down the basic equations for taking the stress out of design.
Video.title: The Laws of Lighting & Color

Video.summary: Levi Kelly explores tiny BNB's, from snow covered yurts to reimagined shipping containers.
Video.title: Sensational Silos / Small Southern Sojourns

Video.summary: Andrea heads to Hollywood for smoothies and trivia with American Ninja Warrior's Matt Iseman.
Video.title: Matt Iseman’s Personal Paradise

Video.summary: Levi Kelly explores tiny BNB's, from snow covered yurts to reimagined shipping containers.

Video.summary: Andrea’s off to Huntington Beach, California to spend the day with Cassie Randolph.
Video.title: Cassie Randolph’s Beachside Bungalow

Video.summary: Kristen and Michael help prospective buyers Malachi and Christina purchase their first vacation home.
Video.title: Starbreaker Ranch at Joshua Tree

Video.summary: Real estate investor Bara helps guide Gillian through the purchase of her first short-term rental home.
Video.title: Austin's Casa Azul

Video.summary: Leah heads to Dana Spinola's posh pad and NFL veteran Matt Schaub's mega mansion.
Video.title: Dana Spinola & Matt Schaub

Video.summary: Homeworthy founders Alison Kenworthy and Michael Koenigs open the door to their Manhattan apartment.
Video.title: NYC Family Home: Homeworthy Founders

Video.summary: Andrea’s in sunny California for a day of family fun with Glee alum Heather Morris.
Video.title: Heather Morris’ Southwestern Style Sanctuary

Video.summary: Renowned designer Bunny Williams opens the doors to her beautiful 1860s Falls Village estate.

Video.summary: In NJ, Caley Svensson transformed a former Tuscany style home into an English countryside haven.

An English-Inspired Home with a Farm in New Jersey

Video.summary: Fran and Theresa want to create a safe, family-friendly haven for their 13 grandkids.
Video.title: Fran & Theresa’s Family-Friendly Haven

Video.summary: Darrel and Patrice of Maxam Hotels embark on an epic journey to build a tiny home resort.
Video.title: The Blueprint

Video.summary: Darrel and Patrice begin construction, laying the foundation for the resort.
Video.title: Foundations

Video.summary: The tension begins to mount as the deadline looms larger.
Video.title: The Drop

Video.summary: It’s all hands-on deck at the resort and the team is working around the clock.
Video.title: Down to the Wire

Video.summary: With power finally in place, the Maxams begin to ready the resort for opening.
Video.title: Sewing Up Loose Ends

Video.summary: The town of Sodus shows up as the Maxams unveil The Finger Lakes Treehouse Resort.
Video.title: Ribbon Cutting
